chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 155 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 29.01.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghalib, Entomologist, Department of Plant Protection Karachi- respondent No.3 Mr. Shahanshah Shamil Paracha advocate for respondent No.4 Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for respondent No.5 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Statement filed on behalf of petitioner’s counsel is taken on record. It is jointly submitted that the application filed by the petitioner dated 22.01.2025 shall be determined expeditiously, preferably within ten days, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is jointly stated that the petition may be disposed off in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
